inputs.label: Center X (h)
inputs.businessContext: Horizontal coordinate of the hyperbola center.

inputs.label: Center Y (k)
inputs.businessContext: Vertical coordinate of the hyperbola center.

inputs.label: Semi-Major Axis (a)
inputs.businessContext: Distance from center to vertex along transverse axis.

inputs.label: Semi-Minor Axis (b)
inputs.businessContext: Distance related to asymptote slope, perpendicular to a.

inputs.label: Transverse Axis
inputs.businessContext: Direction of transverse axis: 0 for horizontal, 1 for vertical.
